era: Hip-Hop. E=6 -- reunion energy, legacy weight, full-circle return. Blue Scholars (Geo + Sabzi) returns 57 degrees after degree 99. The densest artistic network in the engine (8 entries across 57 degrees) collapses back into the original duo. Back-to-back E=6 with The Physics (155). Twenty-third degree in the hip-hop era (134-156).

location.formative: Rainier Valley -- most diverse neighborhood in Seattle, south-end cultural engine of Seattle hip-hop. Mass Line Media. Filipino-American and Iranian-American identities.
location.career: Blue Scholars. Geo (Geologic/Prometheus Brown/George Quibuyen) + Sabzi (Alexei Saba Mohajerjasbi). Political hip-hop duo. Producer-MC model. 2002-present.

members.name: Geo (George Quibuyen / Geologic / Prometheus Brown)
members.note: Filipino-American. Three-name artist (99, 152, 153, 156). MC. Activist. Institution builder. The voice.

members.name: Sabzi (Alexei Saba Mohajerjasbi)
members.note: Iranian-American. Multi-partnership (Blue Scholars, Common Market). The sonic architect. Producer-MC model.

associated_musicians.name: Common Market (RA Scion + Sabzi)
associated_musicians.note: Sabzi produces both Blue Scholars and Common Market. Two duos, one producer.

associated_musicians.name: Mass Line Media roster
associated_musicians.note: Geo's label. Community infrastructure for Seattle hip-hop and Filipino-American voices.

associated_musicians.name: The Physics
associated_musicians.note: Back-to-back E=6. The Physics (155) and Blue Scholars (156). Hip-hop era peak zone.

theory_nodes.concept: 57-degree full circle -- Blue Scholars debut at 99, return at 156. 57-degree span (nearly 1/6 of rotation). 8 entries by duo members. Densest artistic network in engine. Duo > individuals > duo: the full circle completes.
examples: 99: Blue Scholars debut. Geo + Sabzi. Political hip-hop.
101, 145: Common Market. Sabzi with RA Scion.
152: Prometheus Brown. Geo solo. Filipino-American identity.
153: Geo solo. Mass Line Media. Institution builder.
156: Blue Scholars return. 57 degrees. Full circle.
theory_nodes.description: 57-degree full circle. 8 entries. Densest network. Duo returns.

genealogy.relationship: Blue Scholars return at 156. Full circle.

theory_nodes.concept: Reunion energy -- individual members peaked at E=5; together at return they reach E=6. Reunion energy exceeds sum of parts. Back-to-back E=6 with The Physics (155). Hip-hop era peak zone at degrees 155-156.
examples: Geo solo: E=5 at 152, E=5 at 153. Individual ceiling.
Blue Scholars return: E=6 at 156. Reunion exceeds individual sum.
Back-to-back E=6: The Physics (155) + Blue Scholars (156). Peak zone.
Structural energy: full-circle moments carry narrative weight.
theory_nodes.description: Reunion energy. E=6 exceeds individual E=5. Peak zone.

genealogy.relationship: Blue Scholars return at 156. Reunion energy = E=6.

theory_nodes.concept: Seattle's defining hip-hop duo -- political hip-hop template established at 99; producer-MC model; Rainier Valley roots; community infrastructure through Mass Line Media; cultural ambassadors; legacy confirmed at return. The duo that launched the hip-hop era returns to close its peak zone.
examples: Political template at 99: labor, gentrification, immigration, solidarity.
Producer-MC model: Geo + Sabzi. Extended through Common Market.
Rainier Valley: most diverse neighborhood. South-end cultural engine.
Mass Line Media: community infrastructure. Filipino-American platform.
theory_nodes.description: Seattle's defining duo. Political template. Rainier Valley. Legacy.

genealogy.relationship: Blue Scholars return at 156. Legacy confirmed.

cross_references.relationship: FULL CIRCLE! Debut at 99, return at 156. 57 degrees. 8 entries by members. Nearly 1/6 of the rotation. The circle completes.
BACK-TO-BACK E=6! The Physics (155, E=6) and Blue Scholars return (156, E=6). Hip-hop era peak zone. Consecutive maximum energy.
GEO ARC! Prometheus Brown at 152 (activist solo), then Geo at 153 (label head), then Blue Scholars return at 156 (reunion). Four-degree Geo arc: 152, 153, 156.
SABZI ARC! Sabzi at 101 (Common Market debut), 145 (Common Market return), 156 (Blue Scholars return). The producer's parallel partnerships converge.
